name: Bounty Hunter
description: No job is too big; no fee is too big.

abilities.name: Big Game Hunter
abilities.description: Applies a debuff to certain top networth enemy heroes. Grants Gondar a kill gold bonus or an assist gold bonus upon killing the debuff-affected enemy hero.

abilities.name: Shuriken Toss
abilities.description: Hurls a deadly shuriken at an enemy unit, dealing damage and slowing the target. While the shuriken may be small, Gondar's precise aim can cause critical damage.

abilities.name: Jinada
abilities.description: Deals bonus damage and stealing some unreliable gold when off-cooldown.

abilities.name: Shadow Walk
abilities.description: The attack breaking invisibility will stun the attacked enemy unit for a short duration.

abilities.name: Friendly Shadow
abilities.description: Applies an invisibility buff based on Shadow Walk of the corresponding level. Has a slightly longer fade time duration for allied heroes. The attack breaking invisibility will stun the attacked enemy unit for a short duration.

abilities.name: Track
abilities.description: Grants True Sight, applies an incoming damage amplification debuff, and information on how much gold the affected enemy unit is carrying. If the Tracked enemy unit dies, Gondar collects a bonus gold bounty. Track does not break Gondar's Shadow Walk upon cast. The debuff applied additionally grants shared vision to Gondar's allied units.
